text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Flash! I'm not gonna make it!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Please, take this little one... to safety!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Er, by "little one," I take it you mean this cell
phone?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: There's no time to explain! Don't let anyone take her! And I mean anyone! I'll melt if you do!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It seems rather unlikely that you would, but you
certainly seem to be in a desperate situation...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I am unsure what is happening here, but I cannot
possibly turn away a friend in need.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, whatcha doin' with that phone? I've been
looking all over for it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Uh... Golshi entrusted me with its safety, you
see...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: And I cannot let you have it!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What? Hey, wait!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant! Perhaps I can conceal myself here...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh! There you are!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
(I should be able to shake her off by blending in
with this crowd!)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, come back! Geez! What's up with all these
people?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ugh, this is the worst! Who even steals someone's phone?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: What?! This phone belongs to you, Jordan?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
For real? You seriously bolted off with it without
knowing the deets?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...I sincerely apologize. I believe I was caught up
in another one of Golshi's schemes.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
It's whatevs. But you know, those were some
really smooth moves back there.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Are you referring to my running? Now that I think
about it...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The way I concealed myself and wove through
crowds... Those skills could be applicable to race
positioning.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inspiration strikes Eishin Flash, and she starts
honing those skills the very next day!
